articles.summary: During times of political turmoil, history often gets rewritten, erased, or lost. articles.title: LEDs Enter the Nanoscale
articles.summary: MicroLEDs, with pixels just micrometers across, have long been a byword in the display world. Now, microLED-makers have begun shrinking their creations into the uncharted nano realm. articles.title: Sub-$200 Lidar Could Reshuffle  Auto Sensor Economics
articles.summary: MicroVision, a solid-state sensor technology company located in Redmond, Wash., says it has designed a solid-state automotive lidar sensor intended to reach production pricing below US $200. That’s less than half of typical prices now, and it’s not even the full extent of the company’s ambition. The...

articles.title: NASA Let AI Drive the Perseverance Rover
articles.summary: In December, NASA took another small, incremental step towards autonomous surface rovers. In a demonstration, the Perseverance team used AI to generate the rover’s waypoints.
